product: Fixed timeout handling for materialized views and streaming tables
tagline: New timeout behavior for materialized views and streaming tables created in Databricks SQL: Materialized views and streaming tables created after August 14, 2025 will have the warehouse timeout…
what_it_does: New timeout behavior for materialized views and streaming tables created in Databricks SQL: Materialized views and streaming tables created after August 14, 2025 will have the warehouse timeout automatically applied. For materialized views and streaming tables created before August 14, 2025, run CREATE OR REFRESH to synchronize the timeout setting with the timeout configuration of the warehouse. All materialized views and streaming tables now have a default timeout of two days.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
